evidence_spans.span: The forward Euler method is applied to an initial value problem by advancing from the current approximation along the current vector-field slope.
Its update is y_{n+1} = y_n + hF(t_n,y_n).

results.rationale: The forward Euler method uses the vector field F to compute its update step, as shown in the update formula y_{n+1} = y_n + hF(t_n,y_n). Thus, the vector field is applied in the method.
